results.title: Assam Assembly Faces Turmoil Over Power Supply Crisis
results.description: The opening day of the Budget Session in Assam's Legislative Assembly was marked by significant unrest as Congress legislators walked out in protest against the state's deteriorating power supply situation. The opposition accused the government of failing to provide consistent electricity, leading to severe disruptions for residents, especially during the sweltering heat. The Speaker's refusal to allow a discussion on this pressing issue has intensified the criticism, with lawmakers demanding immediate government intervention to address the ongoing crisis. This situation raises concerns about the impact on daily life and the upcoming examinations for students amid frequent power outages.

results.title: Mourners carry ‘Kill Trump’ banners at Khamenei’s funeral procession; Eulogist calls for Trump’s death
results.description: TEHRAN: Mourners attending the funeral procession of former Iranian Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei in Tehran on Monday carried banners and placards calling for the death of US President Donald Trump, as reported by Al Jazeera. Images from the procession showed a banner reading “Kill Trump”, with a bullet depicted running through the word “Trump”. Other [...]

results.title: PM Modi's Visit to Indonesia to Boost Defence, Critical Mineral Ties: Officials
results.description: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi is visiting Indonesia from 6-8 July as part of a three-nation visit covering Australia and New Zealand as well.

results.title: Russia, China Test Drone and Counter-Drone Tactics in Joint Exercise
results.description: QINGDAO (Sputnik) - The Russian Pacific Fleet and the Chinese People's Liberation Army Navy will deploy unmanned systems and practice counter-drone tactics during the Naval Interaction-2026 joint exercise, Russian Rear Admiral Sergei Sinko said on Monday.
